languages.text: {n}Вы замечаете металлический отблеск — и через секунду чувствуете удар ужасной силы. Массивная конечность, хлестнувшая вас, гулко падает на пол, а манипуляторы в подбрюшье машины яростно верещат. Судороги проходят по корпусу — и конструкт вновь затихает.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Вы замечаете металлический отблеск — и через секунду чувствуете удар ужасной силы. Массивная конечность, хлестнувшая вас, гулко падает на пол, а манипуляторы в подбрюшье машины яростно верещат. Судороги проходят по корпусу — и конструкт вновь затихает.{/n}

{n}Вы замечаете металлический отблеск — и через секунду чувствуете удар ужасной силы. Массивная конечность, хлестнувшая вас, гулко падает на пол, а манипуляторы в подбрюшье машины яростно верещат. Судороги проходят по корпусу — и конструкт вновь затихает.{/n}

languages.text: {n}You barely notice a flash of metal before the terrible impact comes. The massive limb that lunged at you drops to the floor with a heavy clang. The manipulators in the machine's underbelly give a furious screech, its frame twitches convulsively — and the construct becomes dormant once more.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вы замечаете металлический отблеск — и через секунду чувствуете удар ужасной силы. Массивная конечность, хлестнувшая вас, гулко падает на пол, а манипуляторы в подбрюшье машины яростно верещат. Судороги проходят по корпусу — и конструкт вновь затихает.{/n}

The manipulators in the machine's underbelly give a furious screech, its frame twitches convulsively — and the construct becomes dormant once more.{/n}

{n}You barely notice a flash of metal before the terrible impact comes. The massive limb that lunged at you drops to the floor with a heavy clang. The manipulators in the machine's underbelly give a furious screech, its frame twitches convulsively — and the construct becomes dormant once more.{/n}

{n}You barely notice a flash of metal before the terrible impact comes. The massive limb that lunged at you drops to the floor with a heavy clang. The manipulators in the machine's underbelly give a furious screech, its frame twitches convulsively — and the construct becomes dormant once more.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du nimmst kaum ein Aufblitzen von Metall wahr, bevor der schreckliche Aufprall kommt. Das massive Glied, das sich auf dich gestürzt hat, fällt mit einem schweren Klirren zu Boden. Die Manipulatoren im Unterbauch der Maschine geben ein wütendes Kreischen von sich, ihr Rahmen zuckt krampfhaft — und das Konstrukt wird wieder unbeweglich.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You barely notice a flash of metal before the terrible impact comes. The massive limb that lunged at you drops to the floor with a heavy clang. The manipulators in the machine's underbelly give a furious screech, its frame twitches convulsively — and the construct becomes dormant once more.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vous remarquez à peine un éclair de métal avant que ne survienne le terrible impact. Le membre massif qui s'est jeté sur vous tombe sur le sol dans un lourd fracas. Les manipulateurs du ventre de la machine émettent un hurlement furieux, son cadre s'agite convulsivement — et la construction s'endort une fois de plus.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You barely notice a flash of metal before the terrible impact comes. The massive limb that lunged at you drops to the floor with a heavy clang. The manipulators in the machine's underbelly give a furious screech, its frame twitches convulsively — and the construct becomes dormant once more.{/n}

languages.text: {n}在可怕的撞击到来之前，你几乎没有注意到金属的闪光。向你猛扑过来的巨大肢体掉在地上，发出沉重的哐当声。机器底部的操纵器发出一声愤怒的尖叫，它的框架抽搐了几下，然后再次陷入休眠状态。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You barely notice a flash of metal before the terrible impact comes. The massive limb that lunged at you drops to the floor with a heavy clang. The manipulators in the machine's underbelly give a furious screech, its frame twitches convulsively — and the construct becomes dormant once more.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Apenas notas un destello de metal antes de que se produzca el terrible impacto. La enorme extremidad que se abalanzó sobre ti cae al suelo con un fuerte estruendo. Los manipuladores de la parte inferior de la máquina emiten un chirrido furioso, su armazón se sacude convulsivamente... y el constructo vuelve a quedar inactivo.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You barely notice a flash of metal before the terrible impact comes. The massive limb that lunged at you drops to the floor with a heavy clang. The manipulators in the machine's underbelly give a furious screech, its frame twitches convulsively — and the construct becomes dormant once more.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ひどい衝撃が来る前に、あなたはかろうじて金属の閃光に気づく。あなたに向かって突進してきた巨大な手足が、重い音を立てて床に落ちる。マシンの下腹部にあるマニピュレーターが猛烈な悲鳴を上げ、フレームが痙攣する。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You barely notice a flash of metal before the terrible impact comes. The massive limb that lunged at you drops to the floor with a heavy clang. The manipulators in the machine's underbelly give a furious screech, its frame twitches convulsively — and the construct becomes dormant once more.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Korkunç darbe gelmeden önce bir metal parıltısını zar zor fark ediyorsunuz. Size saldıran devasa uzuv ağır bir çınlamayla yere düşüyor. Makinenin alt kısmındaki manipülatörler öfkeli bir çığlık atıyor, gövdesi sarsılarak seğiriyor — ve yapı bir kez daha uykuya dalıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You barely notice a flash of metal before the terrible impact comes. The massive limb that lunged at you drops to the floor with a heavy clang. The manipulators in the machine's underbelly give a furious screech, its frame twitches convulsively — and the construct becomes dormant once more.{/n}
